title: Pantaloons Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Pantaloons Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Pantaloons Ventures Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Floor Manager at our Srinagar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Pantaloons Ventures Solutions:
Pantaloons Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pantaloons Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
